name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature for pipe-shell
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem

What is the problem this feature would solve? Link to an
example command line that doesn't work today.

## Proposed solution

What you want to happen. A short grammar snippet if it's
a syntax change.

## Alternatives

What other approaches have you considered?

## Backwards compatibility

Does this break the parser? Does it change the exit
status of any existing command?
